calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Yee Jay, Esq. for PLaintiff
Sze Ching Law, Plaintiff
Wing Wei Trak, daughter of Plaintiff Wei Yung Chan who did not appear
Lewis Phon, Esq. for Defendants
Terry Chin and Doreen Chin, Defendants


Unlawful detainer settlement conference held. The parties entered into written stipulation for entry of judgment. The terms of the agreement were put on the record as follows:
Plaintiffs awarded possesion of the premises located at 354 Clement Street, San Francisco, CA
Plaintiff shall have judgment against defendant in the sum of $30,000.00 which shall be due and payable on or before January 30, 2004.
Judgment for possession shall be stayed until August 1, 2004.
Defendant may continue to occupy premises until August 1, 2004, rent free.
If defendant vacated the premises on or before August 1, 2004, judgment will be vacated.
The security deposit of defendant shall be forfeited to plaintiff.
Pursuant to power of attorney, Wing Fei Trak signed stipulation on behalf of her mother, Wei Yung Chan.
JPT: Lawrence Curtice Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge. (622)
